author: Sunny Yu
description: Calculate arithmetic expressions in Live Preview and Reading view. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Sunny Yu
manifest.description: Calculate arithmetic expressions in Live Preview and Reading view.
manifest.name: Note Calc

name: Note Calc

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What’s Changed

### New Features

- Added support for formulas after leading text.
  - Example: `Stop Loss: 208.65 - 1.9874 * 1.5 =` now shows `205.67` with the default decimal setting.
- Added a decimal places setting.
  - Default: `2` decimal places.
  - Options: `0`, `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`.

### Improvements

- Live Preview and Reading view now use the same decimal formatting setting.
- Formula detection now evaluates the final arithmetic expression before `=`, so regular text before the formula is preserved.
- Multiplication operators inside formulas continue to render correctly in Live Preview.

### Documentation

- Updated `README.md` with inline formula examples and decimal place settings.
- Added `TECHNICAL_DOCUMENTATION.md` describing the plugin architecture, parser, rendering behavior, settings, and release workflow.

### Assets

This release includes the required Obsidian plugin files:

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/q7jxb7yxdk-star/Note-Calc/compare/1.0.1...1.1.1
releases.name: Note Calc 1.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Fixed

- Improved popout window compatibility by using the editor or container document instead of the global `document`.
- Removed `!important` from plugin styles.
- Kept multiplication operators visible in Live Preview without relying on `!important`.

### Release process

- Added a GitHub Actions release workflow.
- Release assets are now built and uploaded automatically.
- Added artifact attestations for release assets.

### Assets

This release includes the required Obsidian plugin files:

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/q7jxb7yxdk-star/Note-Calc/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
releases.name: Note Calc 1.0.1
